IDirect3DVolume8::UnlockBox

This function does nothing. It has been provided to ease in the porting of code from DirectX 8.0 to DirectX for the Xbox.

HRESULT UnlockBox();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

The method returns D3D_OK.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8.h.
  Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DVolume8::LockBox
